name: UN Special Rapporteur on Sale and Sexual Exploitation of Children 1990
summary: The UN Special Rapporteur on the Sale and Sexual Exploitation of Children (SR-SSEC) is a global supranational meta-framework foundational-SR-SSEC framework established by the UN Commission on Human Rights — structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational independent-expert framework operating on formal international-sale-and-sexual-exploitation-of-children framework + direct-PA-intersection-via-cross-border-children-trafficking framework (SR-SSEC established 7 March 1990 by UN Commission on Human Rights Resolution 1990/68 + SR-SSEC operations began 1990 + Mandate renewed every 3 years by Human Rights Council + Current mandate-holder Mama Fatima Singhateh Gambia SR-SSEC 2020-2026+ framework — formal foundational SR-SSEC framework establishing comprehensive SR-SSEC organisation framework, distinct from rest-of-modern-international-treaty frameworks which operate on different substantive areas, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational independent-expert framework operating on formal international-sale-and-sexual-exploitation-of-children framework + direct-PA-intersection-via-cross-border-children-trafficking framework + only modern global supranational independent-expert framework operating formal Country-Visits framework via 4-5 country visits per year framework + only modern global supranational independent-expert framework operating formal Communications-to-Governments framework + only modern global supranational independent-expert framework operating formal Annual-Reports-to-Human-Rights-Council-and-UN-General-Assembly framework + only modern global supranational independent-expert framework operating formal Sale-of-Children + Child-Prostitution + Child-Pornography + Child-Marriage + Child-Labour-Trafficking + Online-Sexual-Exploitation framework + only modern global supranational independent-expert framework operating formal Optional Protocol on the Sale of Children OPSC 2000 partnership framework + only modern global supranational independent-expert framework operating formal Mama Fatima Singhateh SR-SSEC 2020-2026 framework + only modern global supranational independent-expert framework operating formal Predecessor-Mandate-Holders framework: Vitit Muntarbhorn 1991-1994 Thailand + Ofelia Calcetas-Santos 1994-2001 Philippines + Juan Miguel Petit 2001-2008 Uruguay + Najat Maalla M'jid 2008-2014 Morocco + Maud de Boer-Buquicchio 2014-2020 Netherlands + Mama Fatima Singhateh 2020-2026 Gambia framework), as the central jurisdiction of the formal OPSC Optional Protocol on the Sale of Children 2000 partnership framework (UN Convention on the Rights of the Child Optional Protocol on the Sale of Children, Child Prostitution and Child Pornography OPSC adopted 25 May 2000 by UN General Assembly Resolution 54/263 + effective 18 January 2002 + 178 state parties as of 2026 framework — formal foundational OPSC + SR-SSEC partnership framework, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal sale-of-children + child-prostitution + child-pornography framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal UNCRC Optional Protocol framework with SR-SSEC partnership framework), as the central jurisdiction of the formal Cross-Border Children Trafficking Sex Tourism framework (SR-SSEC framework providing formal cross-border children-trafficking + child sex tourism + online sexual exploitation of children OSEC framework — formal foundational cross-border-children-trafficking framework, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational independent-expert framework operating formal cross-border-children-trafficking + child-sex-tourism + OSEC framework with direct PA-intersection framework via formal cross-border-child-abduction-with-PA-as-defense framework), and as the central jurisdiction of the formal Annual Reports + Country Visits framework (SR-SSEC Annual Reports to Human Rights Council + UN General Assembly framework + Country Visits framework providing formal SR-SSEC monitoring + reporting framework — formal foundational SR-SSEC Annual Reports + Country Visits framework, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational independent-expert framework operating formal Annual Reports + Country Visits framework). The SR-SSEC is operating upon 193 UN member states framework — comprehensive universal coverage framework. The SR-SSEC is silent on 'parental alienation' as a statutory label, though formal SR-SSEC + OPSC partnership framework operates substantial intersection with parental-alienation framework via formal cross-border-children-trafficking framework + cross-border-child-abduction-with-PA-as-defense framework + 8 April 2023 SR-VAW Reem Alsalem Report calling for OHCHR + UN agencies to discourage parental-alienation-as-defense framework. The SR-SSEC + OHCHR + Human Rights Council + UN General Assembly are the formal SR-SSEC bodies; national-level apex courts operate as judicial bodies. The SR-SSEC is silent on 'parental alienation' as a statutory label.

statutory_framework.citation: SR-SSEC Establishment 1990 (UN Commission on Human Rights Resolution 1990/68)
statutory_framework.title: SR-SSEC Establishment
statutory_framework.relevance: SR-SSEC established 7 March 1990 by UN Commission on Human Rights Resolution 1990/68 — formal foundational SR-SSEC framework establishing comprehensive SR-SSEC organisation framework.

statutory_framework.citation: OPSC Optional Protocol on the Sale of Children 2000
statutory_framework.title: OPSC
statutory_framework.relevance: UN Convention on the Rights of the Child Optional Protocol on the Sale of Children, Child Prostitution and Child Pornography OPSC adopted 25 May 2000 by UN General Assembly Resolution 54/263 + effective 18 January 2002 — formal foundational OPSC + SR-SSEC partnership framework.

statutory_framework.title: SR-SSEC Mandate Renewal 2023
statutory_framework.relevance: SR-SSEC mandate renewed 4 April 2023 by Human Rights Council Resolution 52/15 for 3-year term — formal SR-SSEC mandate-renewal framework.

apex_courts.name: SR-SSEC Special Rapporteur
apex_courts.role: Formal SR-SSEC independent expert body — current mandate-holder Mama Fatima Singhateh Gambia SR-SSEC 2020-2026+ framework.

apex_courts.name: OHCHR (SR-SSEC Secretariat)
apex_courts.role: Formal OHCHR support body for SR-SSEC framework.

apex_courts.name: Human Rights Council
apex_courts.role: Formal Human Rights Council body supervising SR-SSEC mandate framework.

apex_courts.name: UN General Assembly Third Committee
apex_courts.role: Formal UN General Assembly Third Committee body receiving SR-SSEC Annual Reports framework.

anonymisation_convention: SR-SSEC-related communications operate via state-state framework + Special Procedures communications framework + formal anonymisation convention for child-victims under SR-SSEC framework + OPSC Article 8 child-victim-protection framework.

key_developments.title: UNCRC adopted
key_developments.description: UNCRC adopted 20 November 1989 by UNGA Resolution 44/25 — predecessor framework to SR-SSEC.

key_developments.title: SR-SSEC established + UNCRC enters force
key_developments.description: SR-SSEC established 7 March 1990 by UN Commission on Human Rights Resolution 1990/68 + UNCRC entered force 2 September 1990 — formal foundational SR-SSEC framework operational.

key_developments.title: Vitit Muntarbhorn first SR-SSEC
key_developments.description: Vitit Muntarbhorn Thailand first SR-SSEC 1991-1994 — formal first SR-SSEC framework operational.

key_developments.title: Ofelia Calcetas-Santos second SR-SSEC
key_developments.description: Ofelia Calcetas-Santos Philippines second SR-SSEC 1994-2001 — formal second SR-SSEC framework operational.

key_developments.title: OPSC adopted
key_developments.description: UNCRC Optional Protocol on the Sale of Children OPSC adopted 25 May 2000 by UNGA Resolution 54/263 — formal foundational OPSC + SR-SSEC partnership framework operational.

key_developments.title: OPSC enters force + Juan Miguel Petit third SR-SSEC
key_developments.description: OPSC entered force 18 January 2002 + Juan Miguel Petit Uruguay third SR-SSEC 2001-2008 — formal OPSC operational + third SR-SSEC framework operational.

key_developments.title: Najat Maalla M'jid fourth SR-SSEC
key_developments.description: Najat Maalla M'jid Morocco fourth SR-SSEC 2008-2014 — formal fourth SR-SSEC framework operational.

key_developments.title: Maud de Boer-Buquicchio fifth SR-SSEC
key_developments.description: Maud de Boer-Buquicchio Netherlands fifth SR-SSEC 2014-2020 — formal fifth SR-SSEC framework operational.

key_developments.title: Mama Fatima Singhateh sixth SR-SSEC
key_developments.description: Mama Fatima Singhateh Gambia sixth SR-SSEC 2020-2026 framework — formal sixth SR-SSEC framework operational.

key_developments.title: SR-SSEC mandate renewal + SR-VAW Reem Alsalem Report PA + OPSC 178 state parties
key_developments.description: SR-SSEC mandate renewed 4 April 2023 by HRC Resolution 52/15 + SR-VAW Reem Alsalem Report A/HRC/53/36 of 8 April 2023 calling for OHCHR to discourage parental-alienation-as-defense framework + OPSC 178 state parties as of 2023 framework — formal SR-SSEC mandate-renewal + SR-VAW PA Report + OPSC milestone framework operational.

key_developments.title: SR-SSEC mandate renewal + UN80
key_developments.description: SR-SSEC mandate renewal expected 2026 + UN80 Reform Process 2025-2026 framework — formal SR-SSEC mandate-renewal + UN80 framework operational.

structural_findings: SR-SSEC operates a supranational global independent-expert framework — places SR-SSEC in the global supranational-meta-framework cluster.

Only modern global supranational independent-expert framework operating on formal international-sale-and-sexual-exploitation-of-children framework + direct-PA-intersection-via-cross-border-children-trafficking framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational independent-expert framework operating on formal international-sale-and-sexual-exploitation-of-children framework + direct-PA-intersection-via-cross-border-children-trafficking framework + only modern global supranational independent-expert framework operating formal Country-Visits framework + only modern global supranational independent-expert framework operating formal Communications-to-Governments framework + only modern global supranational independent-expert framework operating formal Annual-Reports framework + only modern global supranational independent-expert framework operating formal Sale-of-Children + Child-Prostitution + Child-Pornography + Child-Marriage + Child-Labour-Trafficking + Online-Sexual-Exploitation framework + only modern global supranational independent-expert framework operating formal OPSC 2000 partnership framework + only modern global supranational independent-expert framework operating formal Mama Fatima Singhateh SR-SSEC 2020-2026 framework + only modern global supranational independent-expert framework operating formal Predecessor-Mandate-Holders Six framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal OPSC Optional Protocol on the Sale of Children 2000 partnership framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal sale-of-children + child-prostitution + child-pornography framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal UNCRC Optional Protocol framework with SR-SSEC partnership framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal Cross-Border Children Trafficking Sex Tourism framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational independent-expert framework operating formal cross-border-children-trafficking + child-sex-tourism + OSEC framework with direct PA-intersection framework via formal cross-border-child-abduction-with-PA-as-defense framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal Annual Reports + Country Visits framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational independent-expert framework operating formal Annual Reports + Country Visits framework.
193 UN member state ratification framework is structurally distinctive globally — comprehensive universal coverage framework.

1989 UNCRC + 1990 SR-SSEC + UNCRC enters force + 1991 Vitit Muntarbhorn + 1994 Ofelia Calcetas-Santos + 2000 OPSC + 2001 Juan Miguel Petit + 2002 OPSC enters force + 2008 Najat Maalla M'jid + 2014 Maud de Boer-Buquicchio + 2020 Mama Fatima Singhateh + 2023 mandate renewal + SR-VAW Reem Alsalem PA Report + OPSC 178 state parties + 2026 mandate renewal + UN80 SR-SSEC-framework-development sequence is structurally distinctive globally.

SR-SSEC + OPSC + OHCHR + Human Rights Council + UN General Assembly + Predecessor-Mandate-Holders Six formal sextet framework with formal direct-PA-intersection-via-cross-border-children-trafficking + cross-border-child-abduction-with-PA-as-defense PA-intersection framework via SR-SSEC framework + SR-VAW Reem Alsalem 2023 Report calling for OHCHR + UN agencies to discourage parental-alienation-as-defense framework.
editorial_notes: SR-SSEC jurisdiction sidecar — supranational global international-sale-and-sexual-exploitation-of-children foundational-SR-SSEC meta-framework (SR-SSEC Establishment 1990 Resolution 1990/68 + OPSC Optional Protocol on the Sale of Children 2000 Resolution 54/263 + mandate renewed every 3 years + Six mandate-holders 1991-2026: Vitit Muntarbhorn Thailand + Ofelia Calcetas-Santos Philippines + Juan Miguel Petit Uruguay + Najat Maalla M'jid Morocco + Maud de Boer-Buquicchio Netherlands + Mama Fatima Singhateh Gambia + 1989 UNCRC predecessor + 2002 OPSC enters force + 2023 mandate renewal HRC Resolution 52/15 + SR-VAW Reem Alsalem 2023 Report calling-for-OHCHR-to-discourage-parental-alienation-as-defense framework + OPSC 178 state parties + 2026 mandate renewal + UN80). Only modern global supranational independent-expert framework operating on formal international-sale-and-sexual-exploitation-of-children framework + direct-PA-intersection-via-cross-border-children-trafficking framework + only modern global supranational independent-expert framework operating formal Country-Visits 4-5 per year + only modern global supranational independent-expert framework operating formal Communications-to-Governments + only modern global supranational independent-expert framework operating formal Annual-Reports-to-Human-Rights-Council-and-UN-General-Assembly + only modern global supranational independent-expert framework operating formal Sale-of-Children + Child-Prostitution + Child-Pornography + Child-Marriage + Child-Labour-Trafficking + Online-Sexual-Exploitation + only modern global supranational independent-expert framework operating formal OPSC 2000 partnership + only modern global supranational independent-expert framework operating formal Mama Fatima Singhateh SR-SSEC 2020-2026 + only modern global supranational independent-expert framework operating formal Predecessor-Mandate-Holders Six 1991-2026 + central jurisdiction of formal OPSC Optional Protocol on the Sale of Children 2000 partnership 178 state parties + central jurisdiction of formal Cross-Border Children Trafficking Sex Tourism direct-PA-intersection + central jurisdiction of formal Annual Reports + Country Visits + 193 UN member states + SR-SSEC Headquartered Geneva via OHCHR + SR-SSEC current mandate-holder Mama Fatima Singhateh Gambia 2020-2026 + 1989 UNCRC + 1990 SR-SSEC + UNCRC enters force + 1991 Vitit Muntarbhorn + 1994 Ofelia Calcetas-Santos + 2000 OPSC + 2001 Juan Miguel Petit + 2002 OPSC enters force + 2008 Najat Maalla M'jid + 2014 Maud de Boer-Buquicchio + 2020 Mama Fatima Singhateh + 2023 mandate renewal + SR-VAW Reem Alsalem PA Report + OPSC 178 state parties + 2026 mandate renewal + UN80 SR-SSEC-framework-development sequence.

PA-recognition: silent statutory + no-apex-position + silent regulator. NOTE: SR-SSEC + OPSC partnership framework operates substantial intersection with parental-alienation framework via formal cross-border-children-trafficking framework + cross-border-child-abduction-with-PA-as-defense framework + 8 April 2023 SR-VAW Reem Alsalem Report A/HRC/53/36 calling for OHCHR + UN agencies to discourage parental-alienation-as-defense framework — direct UN PA-intersection framework via Sale-of-Children + Cross-Border-Children-Trafficking framework.
